user_story: As an HR admin, I want to add a new offer approver, so that offers are routed to the right approver by location
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the Offer Approvers screen; When I click Add new offer approver and select locations and approver(s); Then the offer approver rule is created and listed

user_story: As an HR admin, I want to define an out-of-band salary approver, so that offers above the normal band get additional approval
acceptance_criteria: Given I am adding or editing an offer approver; When I set the Out-of-band salary approver(s); Then it is saved against that rule

user_story: As an HR admin, I want to edit an existing offer approver rule, so that I can keep approvers current as locations change
acceptance_criteria: Given an offer approver rule is listed; When I click Edit and change its details; Then the updated rule is saved

user_story: As an HR admin, I want to view offer approvers with their locations and employee class specificity, so that I can review the approval matrix
acceptance_criteria: Given offer approver rules exist; When I open the list; Then each rule shows Location(s), Employee class specific and Approver(s)
